---
title: "Urchin_Practice"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Lab Feeding Trials

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(janitor)

no_choice_raw <- read_csv("data/no_choice_raw.csv")

no_choice <- clean_names(no_choice_raw)
```

```{r}
no_choice |>
  ggplot(aes(y = amount_eaten, color = treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    y = "Amount Consumed (g)"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    detrital = "#354230",
    halodule = "#006600",
    zostera = "#9ACD23"
  )) + 
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}

anova_model <- aov(amount_eaten ~ treatment, data = no_choice)
summary(anova_model)

TukeyHSD(anova_model)

```

```{r}

choice_raw <- read_csv("data/choice_trials_raw.csv")

choice_data <- clean_names(choice_raw)
```

```{r}

choice_data <- choice_data |>
  mutate(pair = paste(choice_a, "vs", choice_b))

```

```{r}
choice_data |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(a_amount_eaten, b_amount_eaten),
               names_to = "species_slot",
               values_to = "amount_eaten") |>
  mutate(species = ifelse(species_slot == "a_amount_eaten", choice_a, choice_b)) |>
  group_by(pair, species) |>
  summarise(mean = mean(amount_eaten, na.rm = T),
            se   = sd(amount_eaten, na.rm = T) / sqrt(n()),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = species, y = mean, fill = species)) +
    geom_col(color = "black", width = 0.6) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +
    facet_wrap(~ pair) +
    labs(y = "Amount eaten (mg)", x = NULL) +
    theme_classic()
```

```{r}
choice_data |>
  group_by(pair) |>
  summarise(p_value = t.test(a_amount_eaten, b_amount_eaten, paired = TRUE)$p.value,
            .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
choice_data |>
  mutate(total = a_amount_eaten + b_amount_eaten,
         a_pct = 100 * a_amount_eaten / total,
         b_pct = 100 * b_amount_eaten / total) |>
  group_by(pair) |>
  summarise(p_value = t.test(a_pct, b_pct, paired = TRUE)$p.value,
            .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
choice_data |>
  mutate(total = a_amount_eaten + b_amount_eaten,
         a_pct = 100 * a_amount_eaten / total,
         b_pct = 100 * b_amount_eaten / total) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(a_pct, b_pct),
               names_to = "species_slot",
               values_to = "pct_eaten") |>
  mutate(species = ifelse(species_slot == "a_pct", choice_a, choice_b)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = species, y = pct_eaten)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.1, color = "red") +
    facet_wrap(~ pair) +
    theme_classic()
```

```{r}
choice_data |>
  filter(a_amount_eaten >= 0, b_amount_eaten >= 0) |>
  mutate(total = a_amount_eaten + b_amount_eaten,
         a_pct = 100 * a_amount_eaten / total,
         b_pct = 100 * b_amount_eaten / total) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(a_pct, b_pct),
               names_to = "species_slot",
               values_to = "pct_eaten") |>
  mutate(species = ifelse(species_slot == "a_pct", choice_a, choice_b)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = species, y = pct_eaten)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.1, color = "red") +
    facet_wrap(~ pair) +
    theme_classic()
```

```{r}
choice_data |>
  filter(a_amount_eaten >= 0, b_amount_eaten >= 0) |>
  mutate(total = a_amount_eaten + b_amount_eaten,
         a_pct = 100 * a_amount_eaten / total) |>
  group_by(pair) |>
  summarise(p_value = t.test(a_pct, mu = 50)$p.value,
            mean_pct_a = mean(a_pct),
            .groups = "drop")
```
